cv.summary: Versatile Engineering Professional with over 7 years of experience delivering scalable technical solutions across frontend development, automated trading systems, and data-driven process automation. Demonstrates advanced proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript frontend engineering, algorithmic trading system design, and workflow automation using Python/Alteryx/VBA, consistently translating complex business requirements into performant, maintainable systems. Recognized for strong analytical problem-solving, rapid prototyping capability, and the ability to architect reliable, production-grade solutions that drive efficiency and measurable impact.

experience.title: Contra Revenue Specialist, Associate Director
bullets: Oversee end-to-end processing of securities invoices, ensuring accurate reconciliation of divisional expenses against SLA 353 targets.
Developed an automated financial reporting solution for the division, eliminating manual reporting cycles and improving accuracy for business stakeholders.
Drive year-end close booking activities in close collaboration with finance teams, ensuring compliant and timely financial reporting.
Proactively recover expenses from business counterparts, maintaining strong relationships with finance teams to enhance operational cash flow.

experience.title: Securities Reconciliation Team Lead, Associate Director
bullets: Led a team of securities reconciliation specialists across Switzerland, Germany, and Italy booking locations, serving as the bank's 1st line of defence for reconciliation integrity.
Built and deployed advanced risk control and transparency tools, achieving outstanding results in external audits with comprehensive documentation and zero findings.
Managed full team lifecycle: hiring, onboarding, skills development, and performance management across a multi-national team.
Maintained consistent SLA adherence and stakeholder satisfaction through client-centric collaboration with business units.

experience.title: Securities Reconciliation Specialist, Authorized Officer
bullets: Reconciled external vs. internal booking entries, investigating and resolving discrepancies arising from Corporate Actions and Settlement processing errors.
Introduced game-changing efficiency improvements to the recon tooling using Excel VBA macros, Alteryx workflows, and custom auto-matching rules — measurably reducing manual intervention rates.
Acted as SME and first point of contact for recon tool queries, supporting Team Lead and onboarding new team members.

experience.title: Account Manager, Russian Desk, Executive Employee
bullets: Managed client book operations for the Russian Desk, covering a wide range of operational, administrative, and compliance activities.
Delivered structured training to Relationship Managers and Assistant Relationship Managers on compliance, client onboarding, and business topics.
Conducted anti-fraud checks and maintained proactive client communication to mitigate risk and ensure regulatory compliance.

experience.title: Banking Operations Specialist (Levels 2 & 3), Executive Employee
bullets: Executed seamless processing of incoming and outgoing securities transfers (MT54X) for a wide range of financial instruments across EMEA and APAC markets.
Led a process streamlining project leveraging MT586 SWIFT messaging to increase STP rate and optimise communication between key Swiss banks.
Deputised for Team Leader: hired staff, provided direction as Subject Matter Expert, and ensured operational continuity.
Moderated Town Hall interviews with senior management, facilitating transparent organisational communication.

experience.title: Trade Support Analyst, Associate 1
bullets: Provided comprehensive trade confirmation processing and market settlement instruction for a wide range of financial instruments.
Monitored trade reflection in fund NAV calculations, taking corrective action to ensure compliance with industry standards.
Reported trade status to stakeholders and resolved settlement and accounting issues to minimise operational risk.

education.degree: MSc Management, Major in Financial Management
education.institution: Wyzsza Szkola Zarzadzania i Bankowosci (Higher School of Management and Banking)

education.degree: BSc Finance and Accounting, Major in Financial Markets
education.institution: Uniwersytet Ekonomiczny w Krakowie (University of Economics in Cracow)

certifications: Certified Engineer of UBS — Credly verified (2025)
